rawContent: Task: 419-260405-054539 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 419-260405-054539 (rerun from April 5) completed a JWT auth redesign with RBAC migration. All 7 pipeline stages completed with 0 retries each, but the verify stage reported FAIL due to 1 test file failing (117 passed, 1 failed). The review stage passed with a verdict of PASS, review-fix had 1 retry (~4285 prompt tokens), and ship was skipped due to local mode with no issue number. The pipeline progressed through review-fix despite verify FAIL, continuing the established pattern where verification failures do not halt pipeline execution. | Pattern: This is the seventh consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, 842, 844, and now 419-rerun) exhibiting the identical flaw: verify stage reports FAIL due to test failures or PagesPageConfig type constraint violations, yet the pipeline proceeds through review-fix and ship without blocking. Five prior retrospectives across two days recommended adding a conditional gate in ship to check verify exit status, but the flaw persists unchanged. The autofix stage cannot resolve this class of errors, and the pipeline lacks a mechanism to halt when verify reports FAIL. | Suggestion: Implement the conditional gate in the ship stage that was recommended in five prior retrospectives without implementation: add a verifyExitCode check in the ship stage template that reads the verify stage's exit status and halts with an error when verify reports FAIL, preventing automatic shipment of code that failed validation. | Flaw: verify → ship gate — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed
